title: Unisys India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Unisys India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Unisys India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Unisys India:
Unisys India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India!
